name: Cantilever Retaining Wall — Overturning, Sliding, Bearing & Global Stability Check
subtitle: Geotechnical Engineering | Civil Structures — EN 1997-1:2004 (EC7) §6, §9, ASCE 7-22 §11 (seismic)

inScope: Cantilever Retaining Wall — Overturning, Sliding, Bearing & Global Stability Check
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Allowable Bearing Pressure of Foundation Soil (q_allow)

standards.name: Cantilever Retaining Wall — Overturning, Sliding, Bearing & Global Stability Check
standards.description: Cantilever Retaining Wall — Overturning, Sliding, Bearing & Global Stability Check — Geotechnical Engineering, Civil Structures

formulas.expression: phi_rad = phi_backfill_deg * Math.PI / 180; Ka = Math.pow(Math.tan(Math.PI/4 - phi_rad/2), 2)
formulas.reference: Ka = tan²(45 − φ/2) — Rankine (1857); valid for horizontal backfill with no wall friction

formulas.expression: Pa_soil_kn_m = 0.5 * Ka * gamma_backfill_kn_m3 * Math.pow(wall_height_m, 2); Pa_surcharge_kn_m = Ka * surcharge_kpa * wall_height_m; Pa_total_kn_m = Pa_soil_kn_m + Pa_surcharge_kn_m
formulas.reference: P_a = ½·K_a·γ·H² + K_a·q_s·H — EN 1997-1 §9.5.2; forces per unit wall length

formulas.expression: M_OT = Pa_soil_kn_m * wall_height_m/3 + Pa_surcharge_kn_m * wall_height_m/2; W_wall_kn_m = wall_concrete_kn_m3 * base_width_m * 0.3; W_soil_kn_m = gamma_backfill_kn_m3 * wall_height_m * (base_width_m * 0.6); M_R = (W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m) * base_width_m / 2
formulas.reference: Moments about toe; W_wall = γ_c × B × t_stem (t=0.3 B approx); M_R = W × B/2 — NAVFAC DM-7.2 §5.2
OTF ≥ 2.0 static (ASCE 7 / EC7 DA1-1); ≥ 1.5 seismic — required minimum varies by code

formulas.expression: phi_base_rad = phi_base_deg * Math.PI / 180; W_total = W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m; F_resist = W_total * Math.tan(phi_base_rad); SSF = F_resist / Pa_total_kn_m
formulas.reference: SSF = W·tan(δ) / P_a — EN 1997-1 §6.5.3; minimum SSF ≥ 1.5 (static)

formulas.expression: W_total_kn_m = W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m; e = base_width_m/2 - (M_R - M_OT)/W_total_kn_m; q_max_kpa = W_total_kn_m/base_width_m * (1 + 6*e/base_width_m)
formulas.reference: q_max = N/B × (1 + 6e/B) — eccentric loading; e = eccentricity from centroid — EC7 §6.5.4

validation.message: Overturning safety factor < 1.5: wall will overturn — increase base width, add heel extension, or install ground anchor
Sliding safety factor < 1.2: wall will slide — add base key, increase base width, or install batter piles
Maximum bearing pressure exceeds allowable: foundation failure risk — widen base, reduce eccentricity, or improve ground by compaction or piling

warnings.message: OTF < 2.0: EN 1997-1 DA1 requirement not met for permanent structures — increase base width to B ≥ 0.6H for typical granular backfill
Sliding SF < 1.5: marginal — NAVFAC DM-7.2 requires SSF ≥ 1.5; add shear key 300 mm deep at front third of base for significant resistance improvement
High surcharge on weak backfill: active pressure substantially elevated — verify drainage behind wall; waterlogged granular fill can reach K_0 = 1.0
High wall with marginal OTF: seismic loading will reduce OTF further — ASCE 7 §11 seismic lateral earth pressure adds 50–100% to static thrust; perform seismic analysis
Bearing pressure > 80% of allowable: settlement risk under sustained surcharge — monitor differential settlement; consider ground improvement if soft soil detected below

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
